transcript.clean_text: the 16th edition of strategy bianca pitted the classic stars and the monuments men against the grand tour greats all of those normally taking on the northern european classics against the climbers a unique race this one 11 off-road sectors 34 of the race over 184 kilometers on white roads the sterato of tuscany and 3000 meters of climbing with just under 100 kilometers to go this happened the wind blowing an absolute gale the world champion taken down many other riders we saw big names abandoned the likes of bernoulds and matthews forced to stop there with allah philippe making his way back to the bunch for a while it looked as though he might not get there it also turned out that the tour de france winner tadepogacha had crashed all out the front originally a nine-man break whittled down to five oblivious to what was happening allah philippe did get back thanks to help from teammates michelangelo giving a pat on the back for his efforts and with just under 70 kilometers to go allah philippe was soon at the front of a chasing peloton just 48 seconds behind the leaders the rest of the breakaway caught as well as made a move alaphilippe not far behind paul gacha there and then pogacchan himself coming to the front of the race and with just under 50 kilometers to go opening up a small gap small soon became bigger and even the world champion couldn't hack the pace pogaccho would find himself all alone only carlos rodriguez within half a minute of him but that gap would grow soon too and today bugatti with over a quarter of the race remaining out on his own suddenly he had half a minute on the peloton rodriguez started to drift backwards but many wondered what could happen and when allah philippe found out the gap even he wasn't in disbelief 25 kilometers remaining when rodriguez himself was caught the gap at over a minute and a half askrain tried to force the issue on the third to final sector allah philippe was done after the work that had put the dane in that position and asgrin dragging simmons valverde as well as narvaez with him final sector and final effort off-road for today pogaccha nothing would deter him with ascrine then joined by valverde even working together they couldn't cut the gap and over 50 seconds was the margin as the slovenian hit the final climb of the day almost five hours in the saddle and the first ever tour de france winner to take victory in stranded bianca he already has two proper monuments he's now won the unofficial sixth today pogaccha with a demonstration we will remember for the ages as for valverde his best ever finish in his last appearance at the race a 21st professional season seeing him finish second and realize the special nature of what had happened in front of him walter with a very good top five bilbao with him narvaez simmons wellens patilli andy gita all there in the top ten as well sienna seeing a spectacular finish the fans returning to piazza del campo and cheering on their conquering hero that's today pulls off something truly special now with rumored appearances at the round of oflandra and before that sam remo who knows what might happen which race is next on his list
